reviews.comment:
ACA FLORES. EXCELENTE ATENCION.
Ofrece un servicio de calidad y rapidez inusitada. Me Asocie hace muy poco tiempo e inmediatamente me hice acredor a una ampla gama de beneficios. Vacacione en Uruguay y tuve que recurir al servicio de A.C. Uruguay un dia domingo a las 1400 ya que conocía el convenio de asistencia existente con paises limitrofes con mucho escepticismo y en verdad me sorprendió el servicio expedito ofrecido por esa institución, no solo por la atención, sino tambien por la existencia de una bateria 12x36 que utiliza mi vehículo Daewoo 0.8 cm3. Los seguros para los automóviles en relación cobertura-costo son muy competitivos (la caja seguros automotor) . Camping y hoteleria muy buenos descuentos y calidad en servicios. Para mí 5/5 (EXCELENTE)

(Translated by Google)
ACA FLORES. EXCELLENT SERVICE.
They offer exceptionally fast and high-quality service. I recently joined and immediately became eligible for a wide range of benefits. I was vacationing in Uruguay and had to use A.C. Uruguay's service one Sunday at 2:00 PM because I was skeptical about the existing assistance agreement with neighboring countries. I was truly surprised by the expedited service offered by this institution, not only because of the attention they gave me, but also because they had a 12x36 battery that my Daewoo 0.8 cc vehicle uses. Their car insurance is very competitive in terms of coverage and cost (La Caja Seguros Automotor). They offer excellent discounts on camping and hotel accommodations, and the service is top-notch. For me, 5/5 (EXCELLENT)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzckp1ZmhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza que un cambio de turno, haga esperar a los clientes 15 minutos frente al surtidor aguardando que un playero se acerque a efectuar la carga.  En un momento salieron todos los empleados del siguiente turno y aun así seguimos esperando para que recibieran orden de comenzar su tarea. Solo falto que izaran la bandera y cantaran el himno!!!! De terror!!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that a shift change makes customers wait 15 minutes at the pump for an attendant to come and fill up their tanks. At one point, all the employees from the next shift came out, and we were still waiting for them to be told to start. They might as well have raised the flag and sung the national anthem! It was awful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNd3E2UWdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Jamás volvería a esta estación. Fui a cargar aceite y no me pusieron el tapón me arruino todo el motor y nadie se hizo cargo ... 28/8/19 la verdad una falta de respeto después de ser clienta y gastar fortuna...

(Translated by Google)
I would never return to this station. I went to get oil and they didn't put the cap back on, ruining my entire engine, and nobody took responsibility... 8/28/19. It was truly disrespectful after being a regular customer and spending a fortune...

reviews.comment:
Única ypf donde siempre tengo un problema nuevo, sus empleados no están atentos y te cargan lo que quieren, o no te atienden nunca. Deberían capacitarlos mejor o cambiarlos.

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
pesima atencion telefonica, imposible comunicarse, se van empleados y no los reemplazan , una pena como se esta "cayendo" a pedazos nuestros querido ACA.
